_comment: Demo backlog for the rob-foulkrod/motown ASP.NET Core MVC app. Each item creates one GitHub issue. 'labels' must already exist in the repo (see setup script in the step-by-step guide, or pass --label which auto-errors on missing labels). 'projectFields' is OPTIONAL metadata used only by the advanced gh-project automation in the demo; gh issue create ignores it. Suggested 'status' values match the board columns in the demo (Backlog, Ready, In progress, In review, Done).

issues.title: Fix broken album cover image on the artist details page
issues.body:
## Summary
On the Artist Details view the album cover renders as a broken image icon.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run the app and open `/Artists/Details/1`.
2. Observe the album art placeholder.

## Expected
The album cover image displays.

## Notes
Likely a wrong path in `wwwroot/images` or the `img src` in the Razor view. Great first issue for learning the View/wwwroot layout.

issues.title: Add a footer with copyright and GitHub repo link to the shared layout
issues.body:
## Summary
Add a simple footer to `Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml` showing the copyright year and a link back to the repository.

## Acceptance criteria
- Footer appears on every page.
- Year is rendered dynamically.
- Link points to the motown repo.

Good beginner task to learn shared layouts.

issues.title: Write a README with project overview, prerequisites, and run instructions
issues.body:
## Summary
The README is currently a stub. Document what the app is, the .NET version required, and how to run it locally (`dotnet run` from `motown.web`).

## Acceptance criteria
- Overview paragraph.
- Prerequisites (.NET SDK version).
- Build & run steps.
- Screenshot or GIF (optional).

issues.title: Create an Artists index page listing all Motown artists
issues.body:
## Summary
Add a controller action and Razor view that lists artists in a responsive card grid.

## Acceptance criteria
- `ArtistsController.Index` returns a view.
- View iterates the model and shows name + photo.
- Empty-state message when no artists exist.

issues.title: Add search and filter for the Songs catalog
issues.body:
## Summary
Users should be able to search songs by title and filter by artist.

## Acceptance criteria
- Search box posts a query string.
- Server-side filtering in the controller.
- Filter state preserved in the URL.

issues.title: Seed the database with sample Motown artists and tracks
issues.body:
## Summary
Provide seed data so the app has content on first run.

## Acceptance criteria
- Seed runs on startup in Development.
- At least 10 artists and 25 tracks.
- Idempotent (does not duplicate on restart).

issues.title: NullReferenceException when an artist has no albums
issues.body:
## Summary
Navigating to an artist with zero albums throws a `NullReferenceException`.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Create an artist with no albums.
2. Open their details page.

## Expected
Page renders with a friendly 'No albums yet' message instead of crashing.

issues.title: Make the navigation bar responsive on mobile
issues.body:
## Summary
The top nav overflows on small screens. Collapse it into a hamburger menu.

## Acceptance criteria
- Nav collapses below 768px.
- All links reachable via the menu.
- No horizontal scroll on a 360px viewport.

issues.title: Add unit tests for the Songs controller
issues.body:
## Summary
There is no test coverage. Add a test project and cover the Songs controller actions.

## Acceptance criteria
- New xUnit test project.
- Tests for Index and Details (happy path + not-found).
- `dotnet test` passes.

issues.title: Set up a GitHub Actions CI workflow (build + test)
issues.body:
## Summary
Add a CI workflow that restores, builds, and tests on every push and pull request.

## Acceptance criteria
- Workflow file in `.github/workflows`.
- Runs on push and pull_request.
- Status badge added to the README.

issues.title: Validate and sanitize user input on the Contact form
issues.body:
## Summary
The contact form does not validate input, leaving it open to malformed data and stored XSS.

## Acceptance criteria
- Server-side model validation with data annotations.
- HTML output is encoded.
- Friendly validation messages shown to the user.

issues.title: Add pagination to the Songs catalog
issues.body:
## Summary
Long song lists should paginate.

## Acceptance criteria
- Page size of 20.
- Previous/Next controls.
- Works together with search/filter.

issues.title: Improve color contrast to meet WCAG AA
issues.body:
## Summary
Several text/background combinations fail WCAG AA contrast.

## Acceptance criteria
- Audit primary pages with a contrast checker.
- Adjust theme variables to >= 4.5:1 for body text.
- Document the chosen palette.

issues.title: Refactor data access into a repository layer
issues.body:
## Summary
Controllers query data directly. Introduce a repository abstraction to decouple data access.

## Acceptance criteria
- `IArtistRepository` + implementation.
- Controllers depend on the interface via DI.
- Existing behavior unchanged (covered by tests).

Advanced task — good candidate to break into sub-issues.
